headline: Invesco Equity And Income Fund Q1 2026 Portfolio Review
summary: We purchased a new holding in the consumer discretionary sector. We also eliminated several holdings, using the proceeds to fund investments we believe have better risk/reward profiles.

headline: FIS Levels the Playing Field: New Trading Platform Gives Firms Wall Street-Grade Investment Tools
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., April 21, 2026--Global financial technology leader FIS® today announced strategic advancements to the FIS Cross-Asset Trading and Risk Suite, a single platform poised to reshape how investment firms of all sizes compete when money is at work in today’s complex markets. The enhanced platform breaks down barriers that have long kept smaller firms from accessing the sophisticated trading tools used by global trading firms’ biggest players.

headline: Evaluating Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent performance context for Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) has drawn attention after a weak share price stretch, with the stock down about 20% over the past 3 months and roughly 35% over the past year. At a recent close of US$48.32, FIS sits below its year to date level, after a period that includes mixed shorter term moves such as a 4% gain over the past week and a 3% decline over the past month. headline: What Makes Barclays (BCS) One of the Best Undervalued Bank Stocks to Invest in
